title: Mrlssti Laser Phantoms
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Groznikandghost.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Groznik]] and [[Elscol Loro]] are confronted by a Mrlssi Laser Phantom of [[Throm Loro]].]]
'''Mrlssti Laser Phantoms''' were special [[Hologram/Legends|holograms]] developed by Professor [[Rorax Falken]] of the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]].

==History==
Falken designed the system for producing the Phantoms while he headed a reconstruction of the Academy's security system. His first Phantom depicted the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Taj Junak]], who had been martyred on the Academy grounds, giving rise to the legend of the "[[Ghost Jedi]]." He later modified it to resemble [[Throm Loro]] in order to trick the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Groznik]] into serving him.

Some months later, [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Director of Imperial Intelligence|Director]] [[Ysanne Isard]] used the technology to train urban fighting against semi-solid Holograms.

==Qualities of Phantoms==
The Phantoms were projected by special two-way [[Holocamera/Legends|holocams]] that covered all parts of the Academy, much like ordinary Holograms. However, Phantoms were at least partially charged with energy, able to affect their surroundings in a variety of ways. A Phantom could simulate the cutting effect of a lightsaber, as well as fire low-intensity energy bolts and duplicate color-coded laser keys.
